detaileddescription.para: This variable retains the IIO context instance
This variable retains the device instance
This variable retains device trigger instance
This variable retains device buffer instance
This variable retains the linear acceleration x channel
This variable retains the linear acceleration y channel
This variable retains the linear acceleration z channel
This variable retains the angular velocity x channel
This variable retains the angular velocity y channel
This variable retains the angular velocity z channel
This variable retains the delta angle x channel
This variable retains the delta angle y channel
This variable retains the delta angle z channel
This variable retains the delta velocity x channel
This variable retains the delta velocity y channel
This variable retains the delta velocity x channel
This variable retains the temperature channel
This variable retains the timestamp channel
This variable retains the scale for the linear acceleration x raw value
This variable retains the scale for the linear acceleration y raw value
This variable retains the scale for the linear acceleration z raw value
This variable retains the scale for the angular velocity x raw value
This variable retains the scale for the angular velocity y raw value
This variable retains the scale for the angular velocity z raw value
This variable retains the scale for the delta angle x raw value
This variable retains the scale for the delta angle y raw value
This variable retains the scale for the delta angle z raw value
This variable retains the scale for the delta velocity x raw value
This variable retains the scale for the delta velocity y raw value
This variable retains the scale for the delta velocity z raw value
This variable retains the scale for the temperature raw value
This variable retains the offset for the temperature raw value
This variable retains the ADIS register map configuration and capabilities
Buffer write index.
Buffer read index.
Buffer containing the read data.
Sampling frequency of the device.
Number of samples to be read at once.
Current set data selection.

briefdescription.para: Constructor for IIOWrapper.
Destructor for IIOWrapper.
Set the device descriptor that defines the device's capabilities, register layout and supported features.
create IIO context based on the given context string and search for IIO ADIS device, enable trigger and map device attributes, device channels and channels attributes.

parameterdescription.para: IIO context string

simplesect.para: ERROR code on IIO context error, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Update buffer data. This function should be called before retrieving data using getBuff** APIs.

parameterdescription.para: 0 for acceleration and gyroscope data, 1 for delta angle and delta velocity data.

simplesect.para: Return true if data was read successfully and can be retrieved, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Stops buffer acquisition.
Get linear acceleration on x axis with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the linear acceleration on x axis in m / s^2.

briefdescription.para: Get linear acceleration on y axis with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the linear acceleration on y axis in m / s^2.

briefdescription.para: Get linear acceleration on z axis with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the linear acceleration on z axis in m / s^2.

briefdescription.para: Get angular velocity on x axis with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the angular velocity on x axis in rad / s.

briefdescription.para: Get angular velocity on y axis with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the angular velocity on y axis in rad / s.

briefdescription.para: Get angular velocity on z axis with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the angular velocity on z axis in rad / s.

briefdescription.para: Get delta velocity on x axis with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the delta velocity on x axis in m / s.

briefdescription.para: Get delta velocity on y axis with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the delta velocity on y axis in m / s.

briefdescription.para: Get delta velocity on z axis with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the delta velocity on z axis in m / s.

briefdescription.para: Get delta angle on x axis with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the delta angle on x axis in radians.

briefdescription.para: Get delta angle on y axis with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the delta angle on y axis in radians.

briefdescription.para: Get delta angle on z axis with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the delta angle on z axis in radians.

briefdescription.para: Get temperature with buffer reads; in this case the retrieved samples are continuous if the function is called fast enough and samples are not overwritten.

simplesect.para: Return the temperature in degrees Celsius.

briefdescription.para: Get buffer timestamp when performing buffer reads; the timestamp represent the time at which the samples from the devices were read over SPI.

parameterdescription.para: The second component of the timestamp
The nanosecond component of the timestamp

briefdescription.para: Get linear acceleration on x axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The linear acceleration on x axis in m / s^2.

briefdescription.para: Get linear acceleration on y axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The linear acceleration on y axis in m / s^2.

briefdescription.para: Get linear acceleration on z axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The linear acceleration on z axis in m / s^2.

briefdescription.para: Get angular velocity on x axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The angular velocity on x axis in rad / s.

briefdescription.para: Get angular velocity on y axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The angular velocity on y axis in rad / s.

briefdescription.para: Get angular velocity on z axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The angular velocity on z axis in rad / s.

briefdescription.para: Get delta angle on x axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta angle on x axis in radians.

briefdescription.para: Get delta angle on y axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta angle on y axis in radians.

briefdescription.para: Get delta angle on z axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta angle on z axis in radians.

briefdescription.para: Get delta velocity on x axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta velocity on x axis in m / s.

briefdescription.para: Get delta velocity on y axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta velocity on y axis in m / s.

briefdescription.para: Get delta velocity on z axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta velocity on z axis in m / s.

briefdescription.para: Get temperature with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The temperature in degrees Celsius.

briefdescription.para: Get angular velocity calibration offset on x axis.

parameterdescription.para: angular velocity calibration offset on x axis.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Update angular velocity calibration offset on x axis.

parameterdescription.para: value to update with.

simplesect.para: Return true if writing was with success and false if not.

briefdescription.para: Get angular velocity calibration offset on y axis.

parameterdescription.para: angular velocity calibration offset on y axis.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Update angular velocity calibration offset on y axis.

parameterdescription.para: value to update with.

simplesect.para: Return true if writing was with success and false if not.

parameterdescription.para: value to update with.

simplesect.para: Return true if writing was with success and false if not.

briefdescription.para: Get sampling frequency.

parameterdescription.para: current set sampling frequency

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Update sampling frequency.

parameterdescription.para: value to update with.

simplesect.para: Return true if writing was with success and false if not.

briefdescription.para: Get diag sensor initialization failure data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag data path overrun data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get automatic reset data.

parameterdescription.para: True if device reset has occured

simplesect.para: true Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag flash memory update_error data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag spi communication error data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag crc error.

parameterdescription.para: True if calculation failure occurred in a CRC

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag standby mode data.

parameterdescription.para: True if device is in standby mode, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag sensor self test error data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag flash memory test error data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag clock error data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag gyroscope1 self test error data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag gyroscope2 self test error data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag acceleration self test error data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag x axis gyroscope failure data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag y axis gyroscope failure data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag z axis gyroscope failure data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag x axis accelerometer failure data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag y axis accelerometer failure data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag z axis accelerometer failure data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag aduc mcu fault data.

parameterdescription.para: True if failure occurred, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get diag flash memory write count exceeded error data.

parameterdescription.para: True if write count exceeded allowed value, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get gyroscope measurement range data.

parameterdescription.para: gyroscope measurement range data.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get internal sensor bandwidth data.

parameterdescription.para: internal sensor bandwidth data.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Update internal sensor bandwidth.

parameterdescription.para: value to update with.

simplesect.para: Return true if writing was with success and false if not.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if writing was with success and false if not.

briefdescription.para: Trigger a bias correction update command.

simplesect.para: Return true if the command was successfully triggered, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Trigger a factory calibration restore command.

simplesect.para: Return true if the command was successfully triggered, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Trigger a sensor self test command.

simplesect.para: Return true if the command was successfully triggered, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Trigger a flash memory update command.

simplesect.para: Return true if the command was successfully triggered, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Trigger a flash memory test command.

simplesect.para: Return true if the command was successfully triggered, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Trigger a software reset command.

simplesect.para: Return true if the command was successfully triggered, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The firmware revision value.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The firmware data value.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get flash counter value.

parameterdescription.para: The flash counter value.

simplesect.para: Return true if reading was successful and data is valid, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get scale value for linear acceleration.

simplesect.para: Return scale value for linear acceleration.

briefdescription.para: Get scale value for angular velocity.

simplesect.para: Return scale value for angular velocity.

briefdescription.para: Get scale value for delta velocity.

simplesect.para: Return scale value for delta velocity.

briefdescription.para: Get scale value for delta angle.

simplesect.para: Return scale value for delta angle.

briefdescription.para: Get scale value for temperature.

simplesect.para: Return scale value for temperature.

briefdescription.para: Sets manually the delta angle scales based on the device id.

parameterdescription.para: Device id for which the scales are set.

briefdescription.para: Sets manually the delta velocity scales based on the device id.

parameterdescription.para: Device id for which the scales are set.

briefdescription.para: Update a field in the register map.

parameterdescription.para: The register address where the field is located
The value to be written.
The bitmask to change

simplesect.para: Return true if updated was successful, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get raw delta angle on x axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta angle on x axis in raw format.

briefdescription.para: Get raw delta angle on y axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta angle on y axis in raw format.

briefdescription.para: Get raw delta angle on z axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta angle on z axis in raw format.

briefdescription.para: Get raw delta velocity on x axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta velocity on x axis in raw format.

briefdescription.para: Get raw delta velocity on y axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta velocity on y axis in raw format.

briefdescription.para: Get raw delta velocity on z axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta velocity on z axis in raw format.

briefdescription.para: Get delta angle on x axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta angle on x axis in radians.

briefdescription.para: Get delta angle on y axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta angle on y axis in radians.

briefdescription.para: Get delta angle on z axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta angle on z axis in radians.

briefdescription.para: Get delta velocity on x axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta velocity on x axis in m / s.

briefdescription.para: Get delta velocity on y axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta velocity on y axis in m / s.

briefdescription.para: Get delta velocity on z axis with register reads; in this case the retrieved samples are not necessary continuous.

simplesect.para: Return true if the reading was successful and result is valid, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: The delta velocity on z axis in m / s.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct iio_channel *chn, void *sample, size_t size, void *d)
memberdef.name: demux_sample

briefdescription.para: Wrapper class for libiio library for IMU devices.
